titles.en: Chapter on the Miqats for ʿumrah From Makkah and the Termination of the Talbiyah by the Performer of ʿumrah
Chapter on the Miqats for ʿumrah From Makkah and the Termination of the Talbiyah by the Performer of ʿumrah

segments: : «مَنْ أَرَادَ أَنْ يَخْرُجَ مِنْ مَكَّةَ لِيَعْتَمِرَ أَحْرَمَ مِنَ اَلْجِعْرَانَةِ وَ اَلْحُدَيْبِيَةِ وَ مَا أَشْبَهَهُمَا وَ مَنْ خَرَجَ مِنْ مَكَّةَ يُرِيدُ اَلْعُمْرَةَ ثُمَّ دَخَلَ مُعْتَمِراً لَمْ يَقْطَعِ اَلتَّلْبِيَةَ حَتَّى يَنْظُرَ إِلَى اَلْكَعْبَةِ ».
arabic.text: : «مَنْ أَرَادَ أَنْ يَخْرُجَ مِنْ مَكَّةَ لِيَعْتَمِرَ أَحْرَمَ مِنَ اَلْجِعْرَانَةِ وَ اَلْحُدَيْبِيَةِ وَ مَا أَشْبَهَهُمَا وَ مَنْ خَرَجَ مِنْ مَكَّةَ يُرِيدُ اَلْعُمْرَةَ ثُمَّ دَخَلَ مُعْتَمِراً لَمْ يَقْطَعِ اَلتَّلْبِيَةَ حَتَّى يَنْظُرَ إِلَى اَلْكَعْبَةِ ».

segments:
Hadith.2952 - Umar ibn Yazid narrated from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
"Whoever wishes to leave Mecca to perform Umrah should enter Ihram from Al-Ji'ranah, Al-Hudaybiyah, or similar locations. And whoever leaves Mecca intending Umrah and then enters in the state of Ihram should not stop reciting the Talbiyah until they see the Ka'bah."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2952 - Umar ibn Yazid narrated from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
"Whoever wishes to leave Mecca to perform Umrah should enter Ihram from Al-Ji'ranah, Al-Hudaybiyah, or similar locations. And whoever leaves Mecca intending Umrah and then enters in the state of Ihram should not stop reciting the Talbiyah until they see the Ka'bah."

narratorChain.raw: 2952 - رَوَى عُمَرُ بْنُ يَزِيدَ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter on the Miqats for ʿumrah From Makkah and the Termination of the Talbiyah by the Performer of ʿumrah

segments: 2953 - وَ رُوِيَ : «أَنَّهُ يَقْطَعُ اَلتَّلْبِيَةَ إِذَا نَظَرَ إِلَى اَلْمَسْجِدِ اَلْحَرَامِ ».
arabic.text: 2953 - وَ رُوِيَ : «أَنَّهُ يَقْطَعُ اَلتَّلْبِيَةَ إِذَا نَظَرَ إِلَى اَلْمَسْجِدِ اَلْحَرَامِ ».

segments:
Hadith.2953 - It was narrated:
"The Talbiyah should be discontinued when one sees the Sacred Mosque (Masjid al-Haram)."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2953 - It was narrated:
"The Talbiyah should be discontinued when one sees the Sacred Mosque (Masjid al-Haram)."

titles.en: Chapter on the Miqats for ʿumrah From Makkah and the Termination of the Talbiyah by the Performer of ʿumrah

segments: 2954 - وَ رُوِيَ : «أَنَّهُ يَقْطَعُ اَلتَّلْبِيَةَ إِذَا دَخَلَ أَوَّلَ اَلْحَرَمِ ».
arabic.text: 2954 - وَ رُوِيَ : «أَنَّهُ يَقْطَعُ اَلتَّلْبِيَةَ إِذَا دَخَلَ أَوَّلَ اَلْحَرَمِ ».

segments:
Hadith.2954 - It was narrated:
"The Talbiyah should be discontinued when one enters the boundary of the Sacred Precinct (Haram)."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2954 - It was narrated:
"The Talbiyah should be discontinued when one enters the boundary of the Sacred Precinct (Haram)."

titles.en: Chapter on the Miqats for ʿumrah From Makkah and the Termination of the Talbiyah by the Performer of ʿumrah

segments: 2955 - وَ فِي رِوَايَةِ اَلْفُضَيْلِ قَالَ : سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قُلْتُ دَخَلْتُ بِعُمْرَةٍ فَأَيْنَ أَقْطَعُ اَلتَّلْبِيَةَ فَقَالَ «بِحِيَالِ اَلْعَقَبَةِ عَقَبَةِ اَلْمَدَنِيِّينَ » قُلْتُ أَيْنَ عَقَبَةُ اَلْمَدَنِيِّينَ قَالَ «بِحِيَالِ اَلْقَصَّارِينَ ».
arabic.text: 2955 - وَ فِي رِوَايَةِ اَلْفُضَيْلِ قَالَ : سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قُلْتُ دَخَلْتُ بِعُمْرَةٍ فَأَيْنَ أَقْطَعُ اَلتَّلْبِيَةَ فَقَالَ «بِحِيَالِ اَلْعَقَبَةِ عَقَبَةِ اَلْمَدَنِيِّينَ » قُلْتُ أَيْنَ عَقَبَةُ اَلْمَدَنِيِّينَ قَالَ «بِحِيَالِ اَلْقَصَّارِينَ ».

segments:
Hadith.2955 - In a narration from Al-Fudhayl, he said:
I asked Abu Abdullah (as): "I entered Mecca for Umrah; where should I stop the Talbiyah?"
Imam (as) said: "At the height of the Aqabah of the Madinites."
I asked: "Where is the Aqabah of the Madinites?"
Imam (as) replied: "At the location of the Qassarun (the dyers' area)."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2955 - In a narration from Al-Fudhayl, he said:
I asked Abu Abdullah (as): "I entered Mecca for Umrah; where should I stop the Talbiyah?"
Imam (as) said: "At the height of the Aqabah of the Madinites."
I asked: "Where is the Aqabah of the Madinites?"
Imam (as) replied: "At the location of the Qassarun (the dyers' area)."

titles.en: Chapter on the Miqats for ʿumrah From Makkah and the Termination of the Talbiyah by the Performer of ʿumrah

segments: : سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ يَعْتَمِرُ عُمْرَةً مُفْرَدَةً فَقَالَ «إِذَا رَأَيْتَ ذَا طُوًى فَاقْطَعِ اَلتَّلْبِيَةَ».
arabic.text: : سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ يَعْتَمِرُ عُمْرَةً مُفْرَدَةً فَقَالَ «إِذَا رَأَيْتَ ذَا طُوًى فَاقْطَعِ اَلتَّلْبِيَةَ».

segments:
Hadith.2956 - It was narrated from Yunus ibn Ya'qub, who said:
I asked Abu Abdullah (as) about a man performing an independent Umrah Mufradah.
Imam (as) said: "When you see Dhu Tuwa, stop the Talbiyah."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2956 - It was narrated from Yunus ibn Ya'qub, who said:
I asked Abu Abdullah (as) about a man performing an independent Umrah Mufradah.
Imam (as) said: "When you see Dhu Tuwa, stop the Talbiyah."

narratorChain.raw: وَ رُوِيَ عَنْ يُونُسَ بْنِ يَعْقُوبَ قَالَ:

titles.en: Chapter on the Miqats for ʿumrah From Makkah and the Termination of the Talbiyah by the Performer of ʿumrah

segments: رِوَايَةِ مُرَازِمٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : «يَقْطَعُ صَاحِبُ اَلْعُمْرَةِ اَلْمُفْرَدَةِ اَلتَّلْبِيَةَ إِذَا وَضَعَتِ اَلْإِبِلُ أَخْفَافَهَا فِي اَلْحَرَمِ ».
arabic.text: رِوَايَةِ مُرَازِمٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : «يَقْطَعُ صَاحِبُ اَلْعُمْرَةِ اَلْمُفْرَدَةِ اَلتَّلْبِيَةَ إِذَا وَضَعَتِ اَلْإِبِلُ أَخْفَافَهَا فِي اَلْحَرَمِ ».

segments:
Hadith.2957 - In a narration from Murazim, from Abu Abdullah (as), he said:
"The one performing Umrah Mufradah should stop the Talbiyah when the camels place their hooves within the Haram."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2957 - In a narration from Murazim, from Abu Abdullah (as), he said:
"The one performing Umrah Mufradah should stop the Talbiyah when the camels place their hooves within the Haram."

narratorChain.raw: وَفِي رِوَايَةِ مُرَازِمٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ قَالَ:

parts.text: َفِي رِوَايَةِ مُرَازِمٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ قَالَ:

titles.en: Chapter on the Miqats for ʿumrah From Makkah and the Termination of the Talbiyah by the Performer of ʿumrah

segments: 2958 - وَ رُوِيَ : «أَنَّهُ يَقْطَعُ اَلتَّلْبِيَةَ إِذَا نَظَرَ إِلَى بُيُوتِ مَكَّةَ ».
arabic.text: 2958 - وَ رُوِيَ : «أَنَّهُ يَقْطَعُ اَلتَّلْبِيَةَ إِذَا نَظَرَ إِلَى بُيُوتِ مَكَّةَ ».

segments:
Hadith.2958 - It was narrated:
"The Talbiyah should be discontinued when one sees the houses of Mecca."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2958 - It was narrated:
"The Talbiyah should be discontinued when one sees the houses of Mecca."
